---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Propose a new feature or user-facing improvement
title: "feat: <short description of the feature>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!--
One or two sentences describing the feature at a high level.
-->

## Problem / Motivation

<!--
What problem does this solve, or what opportunity does it unlock?
Who is affected and how? (e.g. "Students currently have to…")
-->

## Proposed Solution

<!--
Describe your proposed solution in as much detail as you have.
Include mockups, diagrams, or code sketches if useful.
-->

## Alternatives Considered

<!--
What other approaches did you think about?
Why did you settle on the proposed solution?
-->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!--
How will we know this feature is done?
Write clear, testable criteria.
-->

- [ ] …
- [ ] …

## Additional Context

<!--
Links to related issues, prior art, external docs, or anything else that would help reviewers understand the request.
-->
